overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban environment. The clip transitions from a covered concrete walkway to open streets at golden hour, then descends into a neon-lit underpass with towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor
horizontal metal bars along the left retaining wall
large cylindrical concrete column supporting the overhead structure
underside of the highway with visible traffic above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered concrete walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The camera follows the character forward through the shaded corridor, with metal railings lining the left wall and massive concrete pillars on the right. Sparse traffic is visible on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban boulevard with commercial high-rises

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with visible sky and palm trees
camera tilts upward to look up at the towering glass skyscraper facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk, briefly looking up at the towering architecture

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive curved facade and large neon signage
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
massive modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows catching the sunset
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street
large illuminated advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban boulevard bathed in golden hour light. The El Guapo building dominates the right side with its neon signage, while palm trees line the left. The character walks forward along the sidewalk, briefly looking up at the massive glass skyscraper towering overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with digital advertising

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath the LA HUERDA transit bridge
passing a parked police car with emergency lights on the right roadside

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass, passing other pedestrians and observing the illuminated advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: police car parked on the roadside with blue emergency lights visible

entered.detail: massive concrete transit bridge with LA HUERDA signage spanning the road
series of illuminated advertising screens mounted on the underpass ceiling
large vertical billboard with health warning text and cigarette imagery
illuminated advertisement panel with AVANTE branding
bright light at the far end of the underpass indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered underpass beneath the LA HUERDA bridge, where artificial lighting from massive digital billboards replaces the natural sunlight. The environment shifts to a darker, enclosed space with concrete walls lined with advertisements. The character passes a parked police car and continues toward the bright exit at the far end, encountering other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded concrete corridor into a sun-drenched urban boulevard before descending into a neon-lit underpass. It begins by following the character through a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past metal railings and massive concrete pillars. As the character emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a wide boulevard bathed in golden hour light, where the camera pans up toward a towering glass skyscraper and the neon signage of the El Guapo building. The environment then shifts as the character enters the covered underpass beneath the LA HUERDA bridge, where natural sunlight is replaced by the artificial glow of massive digital billboards. Finally, the camera moves through this darker, enclosed space past a parked police car and oncoming pedestrians, heading toward a bright exit at the far end.
